Utility class to work with [`Annotation`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Annotation.html) and [`AnnotatingElement`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/AnnotatingElement.html)
[AnnotationSubset](com/nomagic/magicdraw/annotation/AnnotationSubset.html)
Defines a subset of registered annotations.
[AnnotationSubsetConfigurator](com/nomagic/magicdraw/annotation/AnnotationSubsetConfigurator.html)
When registered to `AnnotationSubsetConfigurators`, can modify (restrict, append) annotation categories that are
 1) Highlighted in diagrams by drawing rectangle around symbols
 2) Marked in the diagram right-side bar (marker area)
[AnnotationTargetParentProvider](com/nomagic/magicdraw/annotation/AnnotationTargetParentProvider.html)
When retrieving annotations by a target object in [`AnnotationManager`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/annotation/AnnotationManager.html), annotations of parent targets are also included (recursively).
[AnyDiagramShortcutsConfigurator](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/actions/AnyDiagramShortcutsConfigurator.html)
Configure shortcuts for all diagrams - symbolic and others.
[AnyReceiveEvent](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/commonbehaviors/mdcommunications/AnyReceiveEvent.html)
A representation of the model object '***Any Receive Event***'.

[Application](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/Application.html)
Main class which connects main parts of MagicDraw.
[Application](com/nomagic/magicdraw/security/Application.html)
A representation of the literals of the enumeration '***Application***',
 and utility methods for working with them.
[Application.Environment](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/Application.Environment.html)
Contains application environment specific constants and utility methods.
[Application.Runtime](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/Application.Runtime.html)
Contains application runtime related constants and utility methods.
[ApplicationConstants](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/ApplicationConstants.html)
Deprecated.
use [`Application`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/Application.html)
[ApplicationExitedException](com/nomagic/rcpf/product/runtime/ApplicationExitedException.html)
This exception is thrown if application must exit.
[ApplicationExitedException](com/nomagic/runtime/ApplicationExitedException.html)
This exception is thrown if application must exit.

Use for creating the Array or HashSet instance.

[ArtifactView](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/symbols/shapes/ArtifactView.html)

[AssertConstraintUsage](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/AssertConstraintUsage.html)
An `AssertConstraintUsage` is a `ConstraintUsage` that is also an `Invariant` and, so, is asserted to be true (by default).
[AssignmentActions](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/AssignmentActions.html)

[AssignmentActionUsage](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/AssignmentActionUsage.html)
An `AssignmentActionUsage` is an `ActionUsage` that is defined, directly or indirectly, by the `ActionDefinition` *`AssignmentAction`* from the Systems Model Library.
[Association](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Association.html)
An `Association` is a `Relationship` and a `Classifier` to enable classification of links between things (in the universe).
[Association](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Association.html)
A representation of the model object '***Association***'.
[AssociationClass](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdassociationclasses/AssociationClass.html)
A representation of the model object '***Association Class***'.

[Associations](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml2/Associations.html)

[Attr](com/nomagic/magicreport/engine/xml/Attr.html)

[AttributeDefinition](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/AttributeDefinition.html)
An `AttributeDefinition` is a `Definition` and a `DataType` of information about a quality or characteristic of a system or part of a system that has no independent identity other than its value.

[AttributeUsage](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/AttributeUsage.html)

[CrossSubsetting](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/CrossSubsetting.html)
`CrossSubsetting` is a kind of `Subsetting` for end `Features`, as identified by `crossingFeature`, to subset a chained `Feature`, identified by `crossedFeature.` It navigates to instances of the end `Feature`’s type from instances of other end `Feature` types on the same `owningType` (at least two end `Features` are required for any of them to have a `CrossSubsetting`).

[ExtractSource](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/refactor/extract/ExtractSource.html)
Represents the source model end of the extract refactoring.

 references from extract source to the target.

Unique value list that supports fast contains method.
[Feature](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Feature.html)
A `Feature` is a `Type` that classifies relations between multiple things (in the universe).
[Feature](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Feature.html)
A representation of the model object '***Feature***'.
[FeatureChainExpression](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChainExpression.html)
A `FeatureChainExpression` is an `OperatorExpression` whose operator is `"."`, which resolves to the `Function` *`ControlFunctions::'.'`* from the Kernel Functions Library.
[FeatureChainExpressions](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/FeatureChainExpressions.html)
Utility class to work with [`FeatureChainExpression`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChainExpression.html)
[FeatureChaining](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChaining.html)
`FeatureChaining` is a `Relationship` that makes its target `Feature` one of the `chainingFeatures` of its owning `Feature`.
[FeatureChainings](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/FeatureChainings.html)
Utility class to work with [`FeatureChaining`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChaining.html)
[FeatureClass](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/FeatureClass.html)

[FeatureDirectionKind](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureDirectionKind.html)
A representation of the literals of the enumeration '***Feature Direction Kind***',
 and utility methods for working with them.
[FeatureInverting](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureInverting.html)
A `FeatureInverting` is a `Relationship` between `Features` asserting that their interpretations (sequences) are the reverse of each other, identified as `featureInverted` and `invertingFeature`.
[FeatureMembership](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureMembership.html)
A `FeatureMembership` is an `OwningMembership` between an `ownedMemberFeature` and an `owningType`.
[FeatureReferenceExpression](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureReferenceExpression.html)
A `FeatureReferenceExpression` is an `Expression` whose `result` is bound to a `referent` `Feature`.

[Finder.ByHyperlinkFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByHyperlinkFinder.html)
Search element by element hyperlink.
[Finder.ByNameAllFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByNameAllFinder.html)

[Finder.ByNameAllRecursivelyFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByNameAllRecursivelyFinder.html)
Search for all elements by simple name among the given root element(s) and all(direct and indirect) children of root element(s)
[Finder.ByNameFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByNameFinder.html)
Search for any first element by simple name among the given root element(s) and direct children of root element(s)
[Finder.ByNameRecursivelyFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByNameRecursivelyFinder.html)
Search for any first element by simple name among the given root element(s) and all(direct and indirect) children of root element(s)
[Finder.ByQualifiedNameFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByQualifiedNameFinder.html)

[Finder.ByScopeFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByScopeFinder.html)
Search for all elements in the given root element(s) and all(direct and indirect) children of root element(s)
[Finder.ByTypeFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByTypeFinder.html)
Search for all elements by element type in the given root element(s) and direct children of root element(s)
[Finder.ByTypeRecursivelyFinder](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Finder.ByTypeRecursivelyFinder.html)
Search for all elements by element type in the given root element(s) and all(direct and indirect) children of root element(s)
[Flow](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Flow.html)

[FlowEnd](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FlowEnd.html)
A `FlowEnd` is a `Feature` that is one of the `connectorEnds` giving the `*source*` or `*target*` of a `Flow`.

[ForLoopActionUsage](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/ForLoopActionUsage.html)
A `ForLoopActionUsage` is a `LoopActionUsage` that specifies that its `bodyAction` `ActionUsage` should be performed once for each value, in order, from the sequence of values obtained as the result of the `seqArgument` `Expression`, with the `loopVariable` set to the value for each iteration.

[INumberingAction](com/nomagic/magicdraw/autoid/INumberingAction.html)
If this Interface is implemented for an Expression NumberPart
 then, the whole of the Framework will be ignored and this class
 will have to take care of the complete numbering of all the elements
 that will be customized with this Expression invalid input: '<'>

 If this INumberingAction will be found in a NumberingScheme
 nothing will be generated by the AutoNumbering framework.

[MembershipImport](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/MembershipImport.html)

[MetadataAccessExpression](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/MetadataAccessExpression.html)

[MetadataFeature](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/MetadataFeature.html)

[ProjectCommandLine](com/nomagic/magicdraw/commandline/ProjectCommandLine.html)
MagicDraw commandline launcher capable of opening project provided using default project arguments.
[ProjectCommandLineAction](com/nomagic/magicdraw/commandline/ProjectCommandLineAction.html)
This class contains general methods (open, close project, read command line properties, connect to server, etc)
 related to project in command line for plugins
 Override [`ProjectCommandLineAction.execute(String[], Properties, Project)`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/commandline/ProjectCommandLineAction.html#execute(java.lang.String%5B%5D,java.util.Properties,com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.Project))
 

 Arguments are specified as name=value pairs. 

 Default arguments that will be used to try and open project:
 
 project - Project name or path
 projectDescriptor - Project descriptor
 server - Server url
 username - Username on server
 password - Password for provided username
 enableSSL - To use ssl
 serverType - Should be any value of `ServerType`, if not specified `ServerType.TEAMWORK_CLOUD` will be used
 encryptPassword - Set true if provided password is in plain text
 properties - Path to properties file containing properties.

[Refactoring](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.html)
To refactor an element in a model, use the [`Refactoring`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.html) class.
[Refactoring.Converting](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.Converting.html)
Converts elements in the model.
[Refactoring.Extracting](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.Extracting.html)
Extracts part of the model into a new reusable piece of model.
[Refactoring.Moving](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.Moving.html)
Moves elements in model to a new owner element with or without connected relations
 An example how to move elements together with their relations:
[Refactoring.RelationReconnecting](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.RelationReconnecting.html)
Reconnects one relation so that it skips selected part of the model.
[Refactoring.RelationReversing](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.RelationReversing.html)
Reverses direction of a relationship.
[Refactoring.Replacing](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/Refactoring.Replacing.html)
Replaces elements in the model.
[ReferenceModificationInfo](com/nomagic/magicdraw/diff/ReferenceModificationInfo.html)

Property change event which will be fired by SmartPropertyChangeListener.
[SmartPropertyChangeListener](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeListener.html)
[`SmartPropertyChangeListener`](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeListener.html) is "smarter" than standard [`PropertyChangeListener`](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.desktop/java/beans/PropertyChangeListener.html),
 because it allows to listen not only to properties of a single model element,
 but also to related model element properties in the model.

class for sort table data.

sort Collection in ascending

[Specialization](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Specialization.html)
`Specialization` is a `Relationship` between two `Types` that requires all instances of the `specific` type to also be instances of the `general` Type (i.e., the set of instances of the `specific` Type is a *subset* of those of the `general` Type, which might be the same set).
[Specializations](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/Specializations.html)
Utility class to work with [`Specialization`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Specialization.html) and [`Type`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Type.html)

The manager of specification windows for all types of model elements.

Documentation comment configurator for comment body representation in documentation node
[SpecificationRecord](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/specifications/SpecificationRecord.html)
This class defines a reference to some page inside an Element specification window.
[SpecificationTitleCreator](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/specifications/SpecificationTitleCreator.html)
Specification Dialog title creator.
[SquareIcon](com/nomagic/ui/SquareIcon.html)
An icon which fits another icon into a square of given size.
[StackTable](com/nomagic/magicreport/format/html/StackTable.html)
Class for keeping value of tag and its position in stack or keeping value of table attribute.
[StakeholderMembership](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/StakeholderMembership.html)
A `StakeholderMembership` is a `ParameterMembership` that identifies a `PartUsage` as a `stakeholderParameter` of a `RequirementDefinition` or `RequirementUsage`, which specifies a role played by an entity with concerns framed by the `owningType`.

[TextUtils](com/nomagic/text/TextUtils.html)
Utility class to check the text formats and convert text from one format to other. 
 

 Several text formats are supported:
 
 plain - text without any formatting 
 html (or full html) - html text 
 light html - restricted html flavor which supports only <a> tags and href with "mdel://" protocol
 rich - an extended version of plain text which support colored fragments (<font color=#> tags) and fragments with references (<a> tags and href with "mdel://" protocol)

[TransformationParameters](com/nomagic/magicdraw/variants/transformation/TransformationParameters.html)
Transformation parameters passed to each [`ElementTransformation`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/variants/transformation/ElementTransformation.html) when model transformation is executed.
[Transition](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/statemachines/mdbehaviorstatemachines/Transition.html)
A representation of the model object '***Transition***'.
[TransitionClass](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/statemachines/mdbehaviorstatemachines/TransitionClass.html)

[TransitionFeatureKind](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/TransitionFeatureKind.html)
A representation of the literals of the enumeration '***Transition Feature Kind***',
 and utility methods for working with them.
[TransitionFeatureMembership](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/TransitionFeatureMembership.html)
A `TransitionFeatureMembership` is a `FeatureMembership` for a trigger, guard or effect of a `TransitionUsage`, whose `transitionFeature` is a `AcceptActionUsage`, *`Boolean`*-valued `Expression` or `ActionUsage`, depending on its `kind`.
[TransitionKind](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/statemachines/mdbehaviorstatemachines/TransitionKind.html)

[TransitionKindEnum](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/statemachines/mdbehaviorstatemachines/TransitionKindEnum.html)
A representation of the literals of the enumeration '***Transition Kind***',
 and utility methods for working with them.
[TransitionPerformancesLibrary](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TransitionPerformancesLibrary.html)
Provides typed access to elements from the TransitionPerformances standard library.
[TransitionPerformancesLibrary.TransitionPerformanceBehavior](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TransitionPerformancesLibrary.TransitionPerformanceBehavior.html)
Type wrapper for the TransitionPerformanceBehavior library element.
[TransitionPerformancesLibrary.TransitionPerformanceBehavior.GuardBooleanExpression](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TransitionPerformancesLibrary.TransitionPerformanceBehavior.GuardBooleanExpression.html)
Type wrapper for the GuardBooleanExpression library element.
[Transitions](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/Transitions.html)
Utility class providing helper methods for working with [`TransitionUsage`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/TransitionUsage.html)
[Transitions.TransitionUsageKind](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/Transitions.TransitionUsageKind.html)
Enumeration of transition usage kinds.
[TransitionTextParams](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/TransitionTextParams.html)
Configuration for creating Transition element text with [`ModelTextCreator`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/ModelTextCreator.html).
[TransitionToSelfView](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/symbols/shapes/TransitionToSelfView.html)

[TransitionUsage](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/TransitionUsage.html)
A `TransitionUsage` is an `ActionUsage` representing a triggered transition between `ActionUsages` or `StateUsages`.
[TransitionView](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/symbols/paths/TransitionView.html)

[Tree](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/Tree.html)
The tree used in MagicDraw browser.
[TreeLayouterOptionsGroup](com/nomagic/magicdraw/core/options/TreeLayouterOptionsGroup.html)
Organic Layouter options group.
[TreeNodeAdornmentManager](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/TreeNodeAdornmentManager.html)
Tree node adornment manager provides registers [`IconAdornment`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/IconAdornment.html), [`NodeIconAdornment`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/NodeIconAdornment.html), [`TextAdornment`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/TextAdornment.html), and [`NodeTextAdornment`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/browser/NodeTextAdornment.html).
[TreeView](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/symbols/shapes/TreeView.html)
This class represents tree header (part of tree symbol).
[TrigFunctionsLibrary](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TrigFunctionsLibrary.html)
Provides typed access to elements from the TrigFunctions standard library.
[Trigger](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/commonbehaviors/mdcommunications/Trigger.html)
A representation of the model object '***Trigger***'.
[TriggerClass](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/commonbehaviors/mdcommunications/TriggerClass.html)

[TriggerInvocationExpression](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/TriggerInvocationExpression.html)
A `TriggerInvocationExpression` is an `InvocationExpression` that invokes one of the trigger `Functions` from the Kernel Semantic Library `*Triggers***` package, as indicated by its `kind`.
[TriggerKind](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/TriggerKind.html)
A representation of the literals of the enumeration '***Trigger Kind***',
 and utility methods for working with them.
[TriggersLibrary](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TriggersLibrary.html)
Provides typed access to elements from the Triggers standard library.
[TriggersLibrary.TriggerAfterFunction](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TriggersLibrary.TriggerAfterFunction.html)
Type wrapper for the TriggerAfterFunction library element.
[TriggersLibrary.TriggerAtFunction](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TriggersLibrary.TriggerAtFunction.html)
Type wrapper for the TriggerAtFunction library element.
[TriggersLibrary.TriggerWhenFunction](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/TriggersLibrary.TriggerWhenFunction.html)
Type wrapper for the TriggerWhenFunction library element.
[TriggerTextParams](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/TriggerTextParams.html)
Configuration for creating Trigger element text with [`ModelTextCreator`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/ModelTextCreator.html).
[TxtImporter](com/nomagic/reportwizard/tools/importer/template/TxtImporter.html)
Imports Text content at runtime.
[Type](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Type.html)
A `Type` is a `Namespace` that is the most general kind of `Element` supporting the semantics of classification.
[Type](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Type.html)
A representation of the model object '***Type***'.
[TypeClass](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/TypeClass.html)

[TypedElement](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/TypedElement.html)
A representation of the model object '***Typed Element***'.
[TypedElementClass](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/TypedElementClass.html)

[TypedElementTextParams](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/TypedElementTextParams.html)
Configuration for creating TypeElement text with [`ModelTextCreator`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/ModelTextCreator.html).
[TypeFeaturing](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/TypeFeaturing.html)
A `TypeFeaturing` is a `Featuring` `Relationship` in which the `featureOfType` is the `source` and the `featuringType` is the `target`.
[TypeFilter](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/selection/TypeFilter.html)
Type element filter.
[TypeFilterImpl](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/selection/TypeFilterImpl.html)
Default [`TypeFilter`](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/dialogs/selection/TypeFilter.html) implementation.
[TypeMapProfile](com/nomagic/magicdraw/modeltransformations/TypeMapProfile.html)
TypeMapProfile - class for type mapping.
[TypeProperty](com/nomagic/magicdraw/properties/TypeProperty.html)
Property for selecting ModelElement of given type.
[Types](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/Types.html)
Utility class to work with [`Type`](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Type.html)

Contains various UML2 model related utility methods.

The **Adapter Factory** for the model.

The **Factory** for the model.
[UMLPackage](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/metadata/UMLPackage.html)
The **Package** for the model.
[UMLPackage.Literals](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/metadata/UMLPackage.Literals.html)
Defines literals for the meta objects that represent
 
 each class,
 each feature of each class,
 each enum,
 and each data type
 
 end-user-doc
[UMLSwitch<T>](com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/util/UMLSwitch.html)
The **Switch** for the model's inheritance hierarchy.
[Unioning](com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Unioning.html)
`Unioning` is a `Relationship` that makes its `unioningType` one of the `unioningTypes` of its `typeUnioned`.

Interface for components that are able to paint their contents scaled (zoomed).
[ZoomHelper](com/nomagic/magicdraw/ui/zoom/ZoomHelper.html)
Helper functions to display zoomed GUI components

<div class="block"><code>Conjugation</code> is a <code>Relationship</code> between two types in which the <code>conjugatedType</code> inherits all the <code>Features</code> of the <code>originalType</code>, but with all <code>input</code> and <code>output</code> <code>Features</code> reversed.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Utility methods for conjugation</div>
</div>

</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/CrossSubsetting.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">CrossSubsetting</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block"><code>CrossSubsetting</code> is a kind of <code>Subsetting</code> for end <code>Features</code>, as identified by <code>crossingFeature</code>, to subset a chained <code>Feature</code>, identified by <code>crossedFeature.</code> It navigates to instances of the end <code>Feature</code>’s type from instances of other end <code>Feature</code> types on the same <code>owningType</code> (at least two end <code>Features</code> are required for any of them to have a <code>CrossSubsetting</code>).</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/CrossSubsettings.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model">CrossSubsettings</a></div>

</div>

<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/refactor/extract/ExtractTarget.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.refactor.extract">ExtractTarget</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">Controls extract refactoring result: target diagram type, target namespace,
 references from extract source to the target.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml2/util/FastContainsList.html" title="class in com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml2.util">FastContainsList&lt;T&gt;</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Unique value list that supports fast contains method.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Feature.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">Feature</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>Feature</code> is a <code>Type</code> that classifies relations between multiple things (in the universe).</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Feature.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Feature</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A representation of the model object '<em><b>Feature</b></em>'.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChainExpression.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">FeatureChainExpression</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>FeatureChainExpression</code> is an <code>OperatorExpression</code> whose operator is <code>"."</code>, which resolves to the <code>Function</code> <em><code>ControlFunctions::'.'</code></em> from the Kernel Functions Library.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/FeatureChainExpressions.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model">FeatureChainExpressions</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Utility class to work with <a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChainExpression.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml"><code>FeatureChainExpression</code></a></div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChaining.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">FeatureChaining</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block"><code>FeatureChaining</code> is a <code>Relationship</code> that makes its target <code>Feature</code> one of the <code>chainingFeatures</code> of its owning <code>Feature</code>.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/FeatureChainings.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model">FeatureChainings</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Utility class to work with <a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureChaining.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml"><code>FeatureChaining</code></a></div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/FeatureClass.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">FeatureClass</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"> </div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureDirectionKind.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">FeatureDirectionKind</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">A representation of the literals of the enumeration '<em><b>Feature Direction Kind</b></em>',
 and utility methods for working with them.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureInverting.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">FeatureInverting</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>FeatureInverting</code> is a <code>Relationship</code> between <code>Features</code> asserting that their interpretations (sequences) are the reverse of each other, identified as <code>featureInverted</code> and <code>invertingFeature</code>.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureMembership.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">FeatureMembership</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>FeatureMembership</code> is an <code>OwningMembership</code> between an <code>ownedMemberFeature</code> and an <code>owningType</code>.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/FeatureReferenceExpression.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">FeatureReferenceExpression</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>FeatureReferenceExpression</code> is an <code>Expression</code> whose <code>result</code> is bound to a <code>referent</code> <code>Feature</code>.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/FeatureReferenceExpressions.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model">FeatureReferenceExpressions</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">

</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/libraries/standard/FeatureReferencingPerformancesLibrary.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.libraries.standard">FeatureReferencingPerformancesLibrary</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Provides typed access to elements from the FeatureReferencingPerformances standard library.</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Type wrapper for the OnOccurrenceFeature library element.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">

</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block"><code>FeatureTyping</code> is <code>Specialization</code> in which the <code>specific</code> <code>Type</code> is a <code>Feature</code>.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>FeatureValue</code> is a <code>Membership</code> that identifies a particular member <code>Expression</code> that provides the value of the <code>Feature</code> that owns the <code>FeatureValue</code>.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Flow.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">Flow</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">An <code>Flow</code> is a <code>Step</code> that represents the transfer of values from one <code>Feature</code> to another.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">

</div>

 input parameters and loop‑variable elements of a <a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/ForLoopActionUsage.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.sysml.model.sysml"><code>ForLoopActionUsage</code></a>.</div>

<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/ForLoopActionUsage.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.sysml.model.sysml">ForLoopActionUsage</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>ForLoopActionUsage</code> is a <code>LoopActionUsage</code> that specifies that its <code>bodyAction</code> <code>ActionUsage</code> should be performed once for each value, in order, from the sequence of values obtained as the result of the <code>seqArgument</code> <code>Expression</code>, with the <code>loopVariable</code> set to the value for each iteration.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">An <code>Import</code> is an <code>Relationship</code> between its <code>importOwningNamespace</code> and either a <code>Membership</code> (for a <code>MembershipImport</code>) or another <code>Namespace</code> (for a <code>NamespaceImport</code>), which determines a set of <code>Memberships</code> that become <code>importedMemberships</code> of the <code>importOwningNamespace</code>.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">If this Interface is implemented for an Expression NumberPart
 then, the whole of the Framework will be ignored and this class
 will have to take care of the complete numbering of all the elements
 that will be customized with this Expression <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span><numberpart>&gt;

 If this INumberingAction will be found in a NumberingScheme
 nothing will be generated by the AutoNumbering framework.</numberpart></div>
</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">

 element should be displayed as a member in user interfaces or diagrams.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Membership.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">Membership</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>Membership</code> is a <code>Relationship</code> between a <code>Namespace</code> and an <code>Element</code> that indicates the <code>Element</code> is a <code>member</code> of (i.e., is contained in) the Namespace.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/MembershipExpose.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.sysml.model.sysml">MembershipExpose</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>MembershipExpose</code> is an <code>Expose</code> <span class="invalid-tag">invalid input: '&lt;'</span>code.Relationship that exposes a specific <code>importedMembership</code> and, if <code>isRecursive = true</code>, additional <code>Memberships</code> recursively.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/MembershipImport.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">MembershipImport</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>MembershipImport</code> is an <code>Import</code> that imports its <code>importedMembership</code> into the <code>importOwningNamespace</code>.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/uml/text/MemberTextParams.html" title="class in com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.text">MemberTextParams</a></div>

</div>

<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/sysml/model/sysml/MergeNode.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.sysml.model.sysml">MergeNode</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>MergeNode</code> is a <code>ControlNode</code> that asserts the merging of its incoming <code>Successions</code>.</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">

<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">

</div>

<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/commandline/ProjectCommandLine.html" title="class in com.nomagic.magicdraw.commandline">ProjectCommandLine</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">MagicDraw commandline launcher capable of opening project provided using default project arguments.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/commandline/ProjectCommandLineAction.html" title="class in com.nomagic.magicdraw.commandline">ProjectCommandLineAction</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">This class contains general methods (open, close project, read command line properties, connect to server, etc)
 related to project in command line for plugins
 Override <a href="com/nomagic/magicdraw/commandline/ProjectCommandLineAction.html#execute(java.lang.String%5B%5D,java.util.Properties,com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.Project)"><code>ProjectCommandLineAction.execute(String[], Properties, Project)</code></a>
<br/>
 Arguments are specified as name=value pairs.<br/>
 Default arguments that will be used to try and open project:
 
 project - Project name or path
 projectDescriptor - Project descriptor
 server - Server url
 username - Username on server
 password - Password for provided username
 enableSSL - To use ssl
 serverType - Should be any value of <code>ServerType</code>, if not specified <code>ServerType.TEAMWORK_CLOUD</code> will be used
 encryptPassword - Set true if provided password is in plain text
 properties - Path to properties file containing properties.</div>
</div>

 An example how to move elements together with their relations:</div>

<div class="deprecation-comment">use <a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartListenerConfigProvider.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener"><code>SmartListenerConfigProvider</code></a></div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeEvent.html" title="class in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener">SmartPropertyChangeEvent</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Property change event which will be fired by SmartPropertyChangeListener.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeListener.html" title="class in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener">SmartPropertyChangeListener</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">
<a href="com/nomagic/uml2/ext/jmi/smartlistener/SmartPropertyChangeListener.html" title="class in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.jmi.smartlistener"><code>SmartPropertyChangeListener</code></a> is "smarter" than standard <a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/21/docs/api/java.desktop/java/beans/PropertyChangeListener.html" title="class or interface in java.beans"><code>PropertyChangeListener</code></a>,
 because it allows to listen not only to properties of a single model element,
 but also to related model element properties in the model.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/Specialization.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">Specialization</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block"><code>Specialization</code> is a <code>Relationship</code> between two <code>Types</code> that requires all instances of the <code>specific</code> type to also be instances of the <code>general</code> Type (i.e., the set of instances of the <code>specific</code> Type is a <em>subset</em> of those of the <code>general</code> Type, which might be the same set).</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/Specializations.html" title="class in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model">Specializations</a></div>

</div>

<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>StakeholderMembership</code> is a <code>ParameterMembership</code> that identifies a <code>PartUsage</code> as a <code>stakeholderParameter</code> of a <code>RequirementDefinition</code> or <code>RequirementUsage</code>, which specifies a role played by an entity with concerns framed by the <code>owningType</code>.</div>
</div>

<div class="col-first odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1"><a href="com/dassault_systemes/modeler/kerml/model/kerml/TextualRepresentation.html" title="interface in com.dassault_systemes.modeler.kerml.model.kerml">TextualRepresentation</a></div>
<div class="col-last odd-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab1">
<div class="block">A <code>TextualRepresentation</code> is an <code>AnnotatingElement</code> whose <code>body</code> represents the <code>representedElement</code> in a given <code>language</code>.</div>
</div>
<div class="col-first even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2"><a href="com/nomagic/text/TextUtils.html" title="class in com.nomagic.text">TextUtils</a></div>
<div class="col-last even-row-color all-classes-table all-classes-table-tab2">
<div class="block">Utility class to check the text formats and convert text from one format to other.<br/><br/>
 Several text formats are supported:
 
  plain - text without any formatting 
  html (or full html) - html text 
  light html - restricted html flavor which supports only &lt;a&gt; tags and href with "mdel://" protocol
  rich - an extended version of plain text which support colored fragments (&lt;font color=#&gt; tags) and fragments with references (&lt;a&gt; tags and href with "mdel://" protocol)
 </div>
</div>
